para_trans: About Devasthan Inam lands in the state
constituted to draft the Act.
Devasthanas of Maharashtra on the committee
regarding the nomination of representatives.
Government of Maharashtra
Revenue and Forest Department
Government Decision No: DEV-2026 / Q.No.40 / Land-01A
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Date: June 17, 2026
Reference: - Revenue & Forest Department Government Decision No: DEV-2026 / Q. No.40 / Land-01A,
Dated June 5, 2026
The Government's Decision
"Maharashtra Devasthan Inam" vide Government Decision dated 5th June, 2026 in this regard.
The draft "Abolition Act, 2026" has been put on hold.
To widen the framework of the Devasthan Inam Lands Act in the state.
To constitute a Committee under the Chairmanship of Additional Chief Secretary (Revenue, Registration and Stamp Duty).
It has come.
The Committee shall consist of representatives of the Devasthanas of Maharashtra as mentioned below:
Being nominated as a member: -
table_trans: Mr. Sunil Ghanwat, National Organiser, Temple Federation
Virendra Ichalkaranjikar, President, Hindu Bar Council
Anup Jaiswal, Secretary Devasthan Seva Samiti, Vidarbha
Mr. Keshav Vidwans, Trustee, Chinchwad Devasthan Rust

para_trans: Government Decision No: DEV-2026 / Q.No.40 / Land-01A
02. This Government Resolution is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
